scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,api,web "npm run dev --workspace @foodsense/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @foodsense/api" "npm run dev --workspace @foodsense/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @foodsense/shared && npm run build --workspace @foodsense/api && npm run build --workspace @foodsense/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @foodsense/shared && npm run test --workspace @foodsense/api && npm run test --workspace @foodsense/web
